## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->

- Fixes the [error](longrun_bw_rhoe_highres) for `longrun_bw_rhoe_highres`
- Reorganizes some groups for plotting
- Removes remapping from longrun pipeline, as it results in this [error](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-longruns/builds/1325#018cdd5c-7d00-4685-9a4b-d1ff9c6caf6d/274-719) when no hdf5 is saved.

## To-do

- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: some fixes for post processing

## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR adds some default radiation diagnostics for `AllSkyRadiationWithClearSkyDiagnostics`. This increases allocation a bit. It also removes some unnecessary diagnostics in some model configs.
